description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a matrix job strategy to test against multiple Couchbase server versions on ubuntu-20.04, setting up a Couchbase service for each job. Configure core dump capturing, install build environment and dependencies, initialize Couchbase, compile an extension, check the cluster, and run tests with a 15-minute timeout. Display core dumps if tests fail.
